blocks.text: QA Report Wave-2 — Module M-002 (Quản lý Tài sản Cảng Bến)
**Date:** 2026-07-01 | **Tester:** AI QA Agent | **Scope:** 36 React pages (re-test after FE Dev Wave-2 fixes) | **Reference:** Wave-1 report `08-qa-report-w1.md` (10 MUST FIX items)
All 10 MUST FIX items from Wave-1 have been verified as fixed. No new MUST FIX items introduced. The 36 pages can be merged.
blocks.title: Verdict: PASS

rows: maCang Form.Item missing name prop — field displays empty
Line 116: name="maCang" added; form.setFieldsValue line 29 includes maCang
Uses raw fetch() instead of shared axios api
Line 5: import api from '../../services/api'; all 8 functions use shared axios
types ASCII but schema diacritics — mismatch
types.ts line 27 already ASCII; schema.ts now matches
useEffect infinite re-render via useCallback dep
fetchData depends on stable primitives (page, pageSize, filter states); no loop
Status badge comparison against ASCII — wrong colors
Line 252: compares against ASCII 'CHO_PHE_DUYET'/'DUOC_PHE_DUYET'; BE returns ASCII
useEffect empty deps — never refetches on search
Line 65: depends on fetchData which captures all filter primitives
Lines 28-35: only sends page, pageSize, cangBienId — matches BE VungNuocController
Line 7: z.string().uuid(); Line 20: z.string().uuid().optional(); Line 63: z.string().uuid()

blocks.text: All 10 MUST FIX items verified against actual source files on disk. BE ground truth confirmed via `ApprovalStatus.java` (ASCII enum: CHO_PHE_DUYET, DUOC_PHE_DUYET, TU_CHOI), `VungNuocController.java` (accepts only page/size/orgUnitId/cangBienId), `CauCang.java` (benCangId as UUID).

rows: BenCang api.ts fetchBenCangList doesn't expose search params
✅ RESOLVED — BenCangListPage uses benCangCRUD.search() from cangbenService.ts
❌ Still open — plain text, not antd Spin/LoadingSkeleton
CangBien ApprovePage uses raw <input> instead of antd Form
CauCang typo, redundant userId, silent catch, VungNuoc userId, toast inconsistency

blocks.text: All 8 NICE TO HAVE items from Wave-1 remain unchanged. Low-priority technical debt for next sprint.

items: All 10 MUST FIX items resolved with correct code changes
No new MUST FIX items introduced in any of the 36 pages
BenCang schema+types unified on ASCII matching BE ApprovalStatus enum
VungNuoc api only sends BE-accepted params
CauCang schema benCangId uses z.string().uuid() in all 3 locations
CangBien UpdatePage maCang field displays correctly with name prop
All field names match BE exactly
No phantom fields in any entity group
Move to FE Dev Wave-3 — address 8 remaining SHOULD FIX items
Optional: Align trangThaiHoatDong from diacritics (HIỆN_HÀNH) to ASCII (HIEN_HANH) to match BE comparisons
Run end-to-end smoke tests against live BE to verify API integration
